headline: Navan (NAVN) Lands Cummins And Enbridge In New Enterprise Travel Push
summary: Navan (NasdaqGS:NAVN) has signed new enterprise travel and expense clients, including Cummins, Enbridge, Viessmann, and ISOPLUS. The agreements focus on using Navan's AI powered platform to manage global employee travel and expenses. The deals add large multinational organizations with extensive workforces and worldwide operations to Navan's customer base. Navan operates in the corporate travel and expense management market, where companies look for tools that centralize booking, automate...
